positive: A whimsical, stylized golden retriever puppy sitting happily in a lush field of oversized wildflowers. The puppy is viewed in a clean, central silhouette against a contrasting pastel sky and vibrant green foliage. The style is modern storybook illustration, highly detailed line work with bold, flat color blocks, suitable for screen printing. Cinematic lighting emphasizes the puppy's soft fur and the flowers' gentle curves. High contrast composition, evoking joy and nostalgia. --ar 1:1
